Interface IuTypeReference<T, R extends IuAnnotatedElement>

Type Parameters:
T - referent type
R - referrer type
public interface IuTypeReference<T, R extends IuAnnotatedElement>
Describes a reference to a generic type.

Each IuType instance either wraps a plain Class instance or contains a reference back to the element that it originated from.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    index()
    Gets the ordinal index associated with a parameter reference.
    IuReferenceKind
    kind()
    Gets the reference kind.
    String
    name()
    Gets the name of the referent type as known by the referrer.
    IuType<?,T>
    referent()
    Gets the referent type.
    R
    referrer()
    Gets the introspection facade for the element through which the reference was obtained.

  • Method Details

    • kind

      IuReferenceKind kind()
      Gets the reference kind.
      Returns:
      reference kind

    • referent

      IuType<?,T> referent()
      Gets the referent type.

      referent().reference() == this must be true

      Returns:
      referent type

    • referrer

      R referrer()
      Gets the introspection facade for the element through which the reference was obtained.
      Returns:
      introspection facade

    • name

      String name()
      Gets the name of the referent type as known by the referrer.
      Returns:
      reference name; must be non-null when kind().isNamed() is true, if false must be null.

    • index

      int index()
      Gets the ordinal index associated with a parameter reference.
      Returns:
      index; must be >= 0 when kind().isIndexed() is true, if false must be -1.
